features.positive_requirement: Factorio 1.0 must load the reduced compiler and emit only declared technologies.
features.target_result: Retained through the legacy target adapter.
features.documentation_consequence: Documented as a reduced compiler surface.

features.positive_requirement: Every emitted technology must keep a stable manifest row.
features.documentation_consequence: Release notes state the eleven-stream boundary.

features.positive_requirement: The target must discover Factorio 1.0 tool science packs.
features.target_result: Legacy tool discovery is selected by the target profile.
features.documentation_consequence: Modern item-based discovery is not claimed.

features.positive_requirement: Generated ingredients must remain researchable on the target labs.
features.target_result: The reduced generator uses the target science progression and skips unavailable packs.
features.documentation_consequence: Claims are limited to the named base and fixture loads.

features.positive_requirement: Only effect types accepted by Factorio 1.0 may be emitted.
features.target_result: Twelve declared legacy effect types are eligible.
features.documentation_consequence: Cargo and other 2.1-only effects are omitted.

features.positive_requirement: External infinite weapon owners must not be double-applied.
features.documentation_consequence: Only the named overlap fixtures support the claim.

features.positive_requirement: Every visible target setting must affect retained target behavior.
features.target_result: The reduced startup settings surface is retained.
features.documentation_consequence: Modern settings families are explicitly excluded.

features.positive_requirement: Runtime state must use the Factorio 1.0 global table.
features.target_result: The target profile selects global state.
features.documentation_consequence: Modern storage-backed behavior is not claimed.

features.positive_requirement: Two clean builds must produce byte-identical release archives.
features.target_result: The canonical package builder is reused unchanged.
features.documentation_consequence: The final SHA-256 is recorded after qualification.

features.positive_requirement: A repair needs a named Factorio 1.0 fixture and exact-version failure.
features.target_result: No modern repair is enabled without target evidence.

features.positive_requirement: The target prototype schema must expose the validated pipeline-extent fields.
features.target_result: The Factorio 1.0 profile does not expose this surface.

features.positive_requirement: The target must expose the modern recipe and receiver limit fields.
features.target_result: The Factorio 1.0 profile does not expose this surface.

features.positive_requirement: The target must expose the validated modern module-permission model.
features.target_result: The Factorio 1.0 profile does not expose this surface.

features.positive_requirement: The engine must support recipe-productivity technology effects.
Profile import and export need a qualified target codec and lifecycle.
features.target_result: No Factorio 1.0 profile codec is qualified.

features.positive_requirement: The target must contain the scripted Space Age entities and events.
features.target_result: Factorio 1.0 has no Space Age scripted surface.
features.documentation_consequence: Scripted Space Age technologies are absent.

features.positive_requirement: The target needs the qualified modern constant-overlay technology shape.
features.target_result: The Factorio 1.0 profile does not enable it.

features.positive_requirement: Native recipe-productivity owners must exist for adoption.
features.target_result: Factorio 1.0 has no native owner family to adopt.
